message:
fix: add exec timeout, inactivity timeout, typed R2 credentials

- Add AbortController timeout (5 min) on container exec fetch
- Set container inactivity timeout (10 min) via setInactivityTimeout()
- Pass R2_ENDPOINT/R2_ACCESS_KEY/R2_SECRET_KEY to container env for
  snapshot upload/restore
- Add optional R2 credential fields to Env interface (properly typed)
